body.notes: D200/D091. Rename cortex batch/query methods to capability names (get_by_activation, traverse_from). Move raw SQL construction into db_proxy. DO NOT change cortex.store()/search()/recall() signatures — only internal SQL paths. HIGH inertia — minimal scope. Close #322.
body.title: T-memorystore: Cortex speaks capabilities, DatabaseProxy owns SQL
body.result: D200 minimal-scope implementation: (1) MEM_COLS constant moved to db_proxy.py — cortex imports and aliases as _MEM_COLS_NO_EMBED for backward compat. (2) fetch_by_ids(ids, excl_types) added to both DatabaseProxy and PGDatabaseProxy — executes SELECT MEM_COLS FROM memories WHERE id IN (...). (3) get_activation_rows(limit, since_hours) added to both proxies — tails heat query. (4) cortex: _get_recently_activated renamed to get_by_activation; _traversal_search renamed to traverse_from; both now call proxy capability methods instead of inline SQL. (5) All 3 internal call sites updated. Smoke tested: fetch_by_ids + get_activation_rows live against PG. HIGH inertia respected — store/search/recall signatures untouched.
